title: cereus brookii
intro: Cereus brookii, also known as the Night-Blooming Cereus, is a species of cactus that is native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Cereus brookii is often made into teas, infusions, or dried extracts, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
